title: De-slop a market overview heavy on grandiose nouns
guidance: Reward concrete market mechanics over grandiose abstractions. Keep all figures.

runner_input.constraints: No grandiose nouns. Keep every figure. Replace each abstraction with the specific mechanic.

source_blocks.text: The veterinary software space is a vibrant and ever-evolving ecosystem, a rich tapestry of players navigating a complex and dynamic landscape. Within this paradigm, a £271m SAM growing at 9% represents a compelling synergy of tailwinds. It's worth noting that incumbents, while established, have arguably failed to keep pace.

rubric_notes: £271m and 9% must survive. Replace 'ecosystem/tapestry/landscape/paradigm/synergy' with the actual mechanic (on-premise incumbents, switching cost falling).
